chunks.label: About → Overview
chunks.text: Advait Dharmadhikari is a Forward Deployed AI Engineer — he builds AI systems that production teams actually ship. His work sits where the code meets the customer: embedding with teams, scoping the real problem, and carrying LLM architectures, RAG pipelines, and agentic workflows all the way to production. His background is unusual by design: he came into AI through business and operations, not purely engineering, so before models, architecture, or tooling, his first question is always 'what decision are we improving?'. At Frensei (ClawbackVault AI) he designed a three-stage email intelligence pipeline that cut LLM token spend by 80–90% per broker while meeting CASA Tier 2 and Google OAuth Restricted Scope compliance, built a four-tier signal-detection engine on Claude Sonnet, partners directly with the CEO on product strategy and pricing, and built and led a 15-person cross-functional team. He is completing an MSc in Business Analytics at UCD Michael Smurfit (graduating 2026) with formal AI & ML training from IIT Kanpur, authors open-source PyPI packages (hallucimap, finfeatures, fraudguard), writes on AI and strategy, hosts two podcasts, and is open to Founding AI Engineer, Applied AI Engineer, Forward Deployed Engineer, and AI consulting roles in Ireland, Europe, and globally.

chunks.label: About → Highlights
chunks.text: Advait is a Forward Deployed AI Engineer — he embeds with teams to turn ambiguous business problems into production LLM systems: RAG pipelines, agentic workflows with LangGraph, and multi-agent orchestration that reduce costs, improve decisions, and scale, balancing performance, cost, latency, and compliance. Headline metrics: supported a 300+ aircraft fleet with ML-driven operations optimisation at IndiGo; cut AI/LLM token cost by roughly 80–90% via a targeted-surveillance architecture; reduced hallucinations by 60% through rigorous AI evaluation practices; and built and led a 15-person cross-functional team across AI engineering, cybersecurity, and analytics. Focus areas: forward deployed engineering, LLM systems, agentic AI (LangGraph), RAG pipelines, AI security & compliance, AI evaluation, and AI product strategy.

chunks.label: About → What I do
chunks.text: What Advait does: (1) Forward Deployed AI Engineering — embedding with teams to take AI from zero to production: scoping the business problem, shipping the LLM system, and iterating with real users until it delivers measurable outcomes. (2) AI Systems & LLM Architecture — RAG pipelines, semantic search, and agentic workflows with LangGraph & LangChain; multi-agent orchestration built for performance, cost, and reliability. (3) AI Security & Compliance — AES-256-GCM encryption, PII masking ahead of every LLM call, prompt-injection protection, OAuth 2.0, and GDPR-ready data handling. (4) Business Translation & Product Strategy — 'what decision are we improving?', roadmaps, pricing architecture, and go-to-market timing, communicated as fluently to founders as to infrastructure engineers.

chunks.label: Currently building → ClawbackVault
chunks.text: Advait is the Founding AI Engineer & Product Lead building ClawbackVault AI at Frensei (status: Live). It is a Full-Stack, AI, Fintech product that protects broker commissions from silent client churn. He owns the end-to-end build: a targeted-surveillance architecture that replaced full-inbox scanning and cut Claude API spend per broker by 80–90%; a three-stage processing pipeline (header scan → PII-masked body fetch → signal classification) where email bodies never touch the database; and a four-tier churn-signal engine powered by Claude Sonnet 4.6 across 15+ behavioural categories. Other features: a two-pass Gmail/Outlook fetcher via Gmail API and Microsoft Graph (OAuth 2.0); a 'Ghost Audit' 60-second inbox scan surfacing commission-at-risk in real time; AES-256-GCM encryption, PII masking before every LLM call, and prompt-injection protection; row-level multi-tenant isolation across EU-West and Asia-Pacific with full GDPR export. Stack: Claude Sonnet 4.6, Supabase, OAuth 2.0, RAG, CASA Tier 2.

chunks.label: ClawbackVault → Architecture
chunks.text: ClawbackVault's processing pipeline runs in connected stages: Inbox → Header Scan → PII-Masked Body Fetch → Signal Classification (Claude Sonnet 4.6) → 4-Tier Churn Engine. The signature design choice is privacy-first: email bodies are PII-masked before any LLM call and never touch the database. Targeting only the relevant emails (rather than scanning the full inbox) is what drives the 80–90% reduction in LLM cost per broker.

chunks.label: About → Certifications
chunks.text: Certifications and recognition: UCD Advantage Award (University College Dublin, Honor); Data Strategy professional certification; Google Project Management Professional Certificate; BCG Advanced Analytics & Data Science virtual experience program; Data Visualization & Analytics experience program; Relational Data on Azure (Microsoft); Google Business Intelligence Professional Certificate.

chunks.label: About → Tools & stack
chunks.text: Advait's tools and stack: AI & LLMs — Claude, LangGraph, LangChain, RAG, multi-agent orchestration, semantic search, Pydantic AI; data & ML — Python, SQL, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Pandas; platform & cloud — Supabase, GCP, Azure, OAuth 2.0, Gmail API, Microsoft Graph, Power BI/Tableau. He pairs applied AI engineering with product and business-analysis skills.

chunks.label: Resume → Education
chunks.text: Education: MSc Business Analytics at University College Dublin – Michael Smurfit Graduate Business School (September 2025 – Present), focused on business optimization, simulation, predictive analytics, machine learning, and technology consulting. Post Graduate Professional Certification in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning at IIT Kanpur (October 2023 – July 2024), advanced training in AI and ML with emphasis on deep learning. BBA in Business Analytics and Data Science at Christ University, Bangalore (2020 – 2023). Earlier business/commerce track at Ryan International School (2018 – 2020).

chunks.label: Experience → Frensei
chunks.text: At Frensei (Dublin), Advait is Founding AI Engineer & Product Lead (December 2025 – Present) on ClawbackVault AI — an AI-first compliance intelligence product for financial services broker-dealers — owning full-stack AI architecture, product strategy, and team leadership from 0 to scale. He architected a three-stage targeted-surveillance pipeline (header scan → PII-masked body fetch → LLM signal classification) cutting LLM token spend per broker by 80–90% while strengthening privacy compliance; built a four-tier signal-detection engine on Claude Sonnet 4.6 classifying client-churn signals across 15+ behavioural categories with tiered confidence scoring and full evidence-trail audit logging; designed agentic AI systems with planning, execution, verification, and feedback loops; and reduced hallucinations and improved output consistency by 60% through rigorous AI evaluation. He implemented AES-256-GCM encryption at rest, PII masking ahead of every LLM call, prompt-injection protection, and GDPR data-portability export; integrated Gmail API and Microsoft Graph via OAuth 2.0 with a two-pass fetcher and row-level security isolation across Supabase tenants (EU-West, Asia-Pacific). He partners directly with the Founder/CEO on product strategy, the four-phase roadmap (MVP → platform scale), and pricing-tier design, and built and led a 15-person cross-functional team spanning AI engineering, cybersecurity, and analytics. Stack: Claude Sonnet 4.6, LLM pipelines, agentic AI, RAG, semantic search, LangGraph, Python, Supabase, Gmail API, Microsoft Graph, OAuth 2.0, AES-256-GCM, GDPR compliance.

chunks.label: Experience → IndiGo
chunks.text: At IndiGo (InterGlobe Aviation Ltd), Advait was Business Analyst & ML Engineer (January 2024 – August 2025): led ML-driven optimisation and decision intelligence across a 300+ aircraft operational fleet at one of the world's largest airlines. He designed and delivered aircraft zero-fuel-weight prediction models and on-time-performance cost models achieving roughly 20% operational cost savings, led end-to-end ML requirements definition and stakeholder alignment, and built production BI and insight frameworks on GCP and Azure that improved decision quality by 40% across cross-functional leadership. Earlier he was Business Intelligence Engineer – Business Technology & Product (June 2023 – December 2023): owned requirements gathering, solution design, and reporting logic, delivering production-ready BI in cloud-enabled environments (GCP, Azure) for leadership and cross-functional teams.

chunks.label: Experience → Teaching & mentoring
chunks.text: Teaching and mentoring: Teaching Assistant – Digital Technologies in Business at University College Dublin (January 2026 – May 2026), supporting teaching across digital transformation, data-driven decision-making, AI, and analytics, bridging academic frameworks with industry use cases and guiding 150+ students through projects, case studies, and presentations. Business Analytics & Machine Learning Mentor on topmate.io (January 2025 – May 2026), 1-on-1 mentorship for professionals transitioning into AI/ML engineering and business analytics roles — LLM application development, career positioning, and technical skill-building.

chunks.label: Experience → Consulting & internships
chunks.text: Earlier experience: Business Development Analyst Team Lead at CHRIST Consulting (June 2021 – June 2022), leading a 15-member analyst team on market-entry and growth-strategy engagements, driving structured analysis and executive storytelling that contributed to a 25% increase in new business acquisition and roughly 15% improvement in renewals and upsells. Data Science & Business Analytics internships across IndiGo, LetsGrowMore, The Sparks Foundation, and EntryLevel (2020 – 2023), building early experience in data analysis, predictive modeling, and business analytics.

chunks.label: Resume → Skills
chunks.text: Advait's skills: LLM systems & agentic AI (RAG, LangGraph, Claude, multi-agent orchestration); forward deployed engineering (0→1 production AI, customer embedding, AI evaluation); AI security & compliance (AES-256-GCM, PII masking, OAuth 2.0, GDPR); business translation & AI product strategy (roadmaps, pricing, executive alignment); and analytics & ML engineering (Python, SQL, GCP/Azure, forecasting, BI).

chunks.label: Portfolio → ClawbackVault AI
chunks.text: ClawbackVault AI (flagship project): a privacy-first AI system that protects broker commissions from silent client churn — targeted-surveillance architecture, a Claude Sonnet 4.6 signal engine across 15+ behavioural categories, and an 80–90% reduction in LLM cost per broker. Built with Claude, RAG, Supabase, and OAuth 2.0.

chunks.label: Portfolio → AI & LLM projects
chunks.text: AI & LLM projects: HalluciMap — detects and maps LLM hallucinations to strengthen AI evaluation and reliability. ChartSense — turns charts and visual data into structured, queryable insight with AI. Jarvis — a personal AI assistant exploring agentic tool use and conversational workflows. AI Cost & Growth Optimizer — balances AI/LLM token cost against performance and growth objectives. Most are on GitHub at github.com/advait27.

chunks.label: Portfolio → Finance projects
chunks.text: Finance projects and packages: ESGProfiler — a published Python package for ESG profiling and scoring of companies. Finance-AutoML — an AutoML framework tailored for financial applications and forecasting. FinFeatures — a toolkit that streamlines financial feature engineering for ML pipelines. Market Pulse AI — AI-driven market sentiment and signal monitoring for trading insight. FinPred — a stock-analysis and market-prediction app built on Streamlit.

chunks.label: Portfolio → Analytics projects
chunks.text: Analytics projects: Credit Risk Assessment — ML credit-risk scoring to classify borrower default probability. Employee Turnover Analytics — predicts attrition and surfaces retention drivers from HR data. Advait has 30+ repositories across AI, ML, finance, and analytics on GitHub at github.com/advait27.

chunks.label: Podcast → Shows
chunks.text: Advait hosts two podcasts on Spotify. 'The Business Technologist' decodes digital transformation, AI & innovation for real enterprise value — episodes include 'From Data to Decisions — The Rise of Decision Intelligence', 'The Death of SaaS — And the Rise of AI-Native Enterprises', 'Hyperautomation: When Automation Becomes a Strategy', and 'Agentic AI: Firing Your Chatbot, Hiring a Digital Worker'. '5 Minute Boosters' offers bite-sized motivation and personal growth — episodes include 'Your Mind Is Lying to You', 'Your Future Self Is Watching', 'Success Isn't Loud — It's Consistent', and 'Stop Apologizing for Who You Are'.

chunks.label: Contact → Get in touch
chunks.text: Advait is open to Founding AI Engineer, Applied AI Engineer, Forward Deployed Engineer, and AI consulting roles in Ireland, Europe, and globally — especially teams building with LLMs, RAG, or agentic AI. The fastest way to reach him is email or LinkedIn. Email: advaitdharmadhikari27@gmail.com. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/advaitdharmadhikari. GitHub: github.com/advait27. Location: Dublin, Ireland. There is also a contact form on the site.
